details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2029.4 using the stock FM input deck.
runs.label: Stock FM 2/2026

details: JGSWITCH=0, JGPHASE=0, JGHILO=0.
UBGH=0.5 for consistency with the replacement family.
JGW=0.020 and JGCOLA=0.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 Base
runs.summary: Baseline with the Job Guarantee switched off.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=1, UBGH=0.5.
JGPHASE ramps 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, then 1.0.
JGW starts at 0.020 and JGCOLA ramps to a $25/hour endpoint over 4 quarters.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 High $25/h
runs.summary: High take-up with a wage ramp from $20/hour to $25/hour.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=0, UBGH=0.5.
JGPHASE ramps 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, then 1.0.
JGW starts at 0.020 and JGCOLA ramps to a $25/hour endpoint over 4 quarters.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 Low $25/h
runs.summary: Low take-up with a wage ramp from $20/hour to $25/hour.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=1, UBGH=0.5.
JGPHASE keeps the standard 5-step ramp.
JGW=0.015 and JGCOLA=0 throughout the run.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $15/h High
runs.summary: High take-up with a flat $15/hour wage.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=0, UBGH=0.5.
JGPHASE keeps the standard 5-step ramp.
JGW=0.015 and JGCOLA=0 throughout the run.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $15/h Low
runs.summary: Low take-up with a flat $15/hour wage.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=1, UBGH=0.5.
JGPHASE keeps the standard 5-step ramp.
JGW starts at 0.015 and JGCOLA ramps to a $20/hour endpoint over 4 quarters.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $20/h High
runs.summary: High take-up with a wage ramp from $15/hour to $20/hour.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=0, UBGH=0.5.
JGPHASE keeps the standard 5-step ramp.
JGW starts at 0.015 and JGCOLA ramps to a $20/hour endpoint over 4 quarters.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $20/h Low
runs.summary: Low take-up with a wage ramp from $15/hour to $20/hour.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=1, UBGH=0.5.
JGW starts at 0.015.
JGCOLA runs for 12 quarters, then returns to 0.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h High 3Y
runs.summary: High take-up with a slow wage ramp from $15/hour to $23/hour over 3 years.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=0, UBGH=0.5.
JGW starts at 0.015.
JGCOLA runs for 12 quarters, then returns to 0.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h Low 3Y
runs.summary: Low take-up with a slow wage ramp from $15/hour to $23/hour over 3 years.

details: JGSWITCH=0, JGPHASE=0, JGHILO=0, and UBGH=0.5.
RS is made exogenous using the exported baseline 2025.4-2029.4 path.
This is a closure comparison against the endogenous baseline, not a new rate-level scenario.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 Base RS Exog
runs.summary: No-JG baseline with RS held exogenous at the baseline forecast path.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=1, UBGH=0.5.
RS is made exogenous using the exported baseline 2025.4-2029.4 path.
The wage path remains the standard 3Y $15-to-$23 slow ramp.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h High 3Y RS Exog
runs.summary: High take-up 3Y slow-ramp run with RS held exogenous at the baseline forecast path.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=0, UBGH=0.5.
RS is made exogenous using the exported baseline 2025.4-2029.4 path.
The wage path remains the standard 3Y $15-to-$23 slow ramp.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h Low 3Y RS Exog
runs.summary: Low take-up 3Y slow-ramp run with RS held exogenous at the baseline forecast path.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=1, UBGH=0.5.
Forecast stays in the stable 2025.4 to 2029.4 window.
JGW starts at 0.015 and JGCOLA uses a slower extended-ramp pace than the 3Y case.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h High 5Y
runs.summary: High take-up with a slower extended wage ramp from $15/hour toward $23/hour.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=0, UBGH=0.5.
Forecast stays in the stable 2025.4 to 2029.4 window.
JGW starts at 0.015 and JGCOLA uses a slower extended-ramp pace than the 3Y case.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h Low 5Y
runs.summary: Low take-up with a slower extended wage ramp from $15/hour toward $23/hour.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2028.4 via fppy.
Residual replay transplants 2008.4 into 2026.1 and 2009.1 into 2026.2.
AR(1)-style residual carry remains active after those two 2026 shock quarters.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h High 3Y 2008 Shock
runs.summary: High take-up slow-ramp run with 2008.4 and 2009.1 shocks transplanted into 2026.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2028.4 via fppy.
Residual replay transplants 2008.4 into 2026.1 and 2009.1 into 2026.2.
AR(1)-style residual carry remains active after those two 2026 shock quarters.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h Low 3Y 2008 Shock
runs.summary: Low take-up slow-ramp run with 2008.4 and 2009.1 shocks transplanted into 2026.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2028.4 via fppy.
Residual replay transplants 2008.4 into 2026.1 and 2009.1 into 2026.2.
The wage path keeps the slower extended-ramp COLA schedule inside the 3-year shock window.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h High 5Y 2008 Shock
runs.summary: High take-up extended-ramp run with 2008.4 and 2009.1 shocks transplanted into 2026.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2028.4 via fppy.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2028.4 via fppy.
JGSWITCH=0, JGPHASE=0, JGHILO=0, and UBGH=0.5.
Residual replay transplants 2008.4 into 2026.1 and 2009.1 into 2026.2.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 Base 2008 Shock
runs.summary: No-JG baseline with 2008.4 and 2009.1 shocks transplanted into 2026.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2029.4.
PIM is overridden at +100% relative to the baseline path.
The wage path follows the 3-year $15-to-$23 slow ramp.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h High 3Y PIMx2
runs.summary: High take-up slow-ramp run with a full-window doubling of PIM.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2029.4.
PIM is overridden at +100% relative to the baseline path.
The wage path follows the 3-year $15-to-$23 slow ramp.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h Low 3Y PIMx2
runs.summary: Low take-up slow-ramp run with a full-window doubling of PIM.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2029.4.
PIM is overridden at +100% relative to the baseline path.
The wage path follows the slower extended-ramp $15-to-$23 path.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $23/h High 5Y PIMx2

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2029.4.

details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2029.4.
JGSWITCH=0, JGPHASE=0, JGHILO=0, and UBGH=0.5.
PIM is overridden at +100% relative to the baseline path.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 Base PIMx2

details: Forecast 2005.1 to 2015.4 via fppy.
JGSWITCH=0, JGPHASE=0, JGHILO=0, and UBGH=0.5.
Residual replay keeps the observed business-cycle/error structure in the 2005.1-2015.4 window.
runs.label: PSE2005 Base Backcast
runs.summary: Backcast baseline from 2005 with the Job Guarantee switched off.

details: Forecast 2005.1 to 2015.4 via fppy.
JGPHASE ramps over eight quarters from 2005.1 through 2006.4.
JGW starts near $11.07/hour in 2005 and grows at 3% annualized inside the 2005.1-2015.4 comparison window.
Residual replay keeps the observed business-cycle/error structure in the 2005.1-2015.4 window.
runs.label: PSE2005 JG Low Backcast
runs.summary: Low take-up backcast from 2005 with a historically plausible JG wage path growing at 3% per year.
